calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Off Calendar

Defendant Geary Lsf Group, Inc.'S Motion To Vacate Writ Order
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. FRANK T. PEPLER OF THE DLA PIPER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 836-2550 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Geary LSF Group, Inc.'s Motion To Vacate Order for issuance of Writ of attachment and to quash writ of attachment is granted. Plaintiffs have not established the probable validity of the claim. The subordination agreements render Plaintiffs' notes payable only after Defendant's obligation to pay the senior debt has been discharged, and thus, Plaintiffs' repayment is not yet collectable. (See Soundlite Systems, Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (1976) 65 Cal.App.3d 78.) Further, whether the subordination agreements of any newly incurred debt apply to Plaintiffs' payment priority is irrelevant in determining the priority of Plaintiffs' notes until the senior debt to which Plaintiffs contractually subordinated their notes is satisfied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (See Order for details) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ehg
